titleEn: Chinese entrepreneur helps expand Thailand's coconut exports
titleZh: 中国企业家助力泰国椰子出口：自动化加工与供应链升级案例
summaryZh: 中国企业家秦少宇自2015年进入泰国椰子产业，通过引入中国自动化去壳设备、优化加工流程、建立分级体系及冷链改进，将泰国香椰对华出口从2014年的少量集装箱提升至2015年约1000个集装箱，其公司占近40%份额。他还在广西南宁投资220万美元建加工厂，利用海运3天到港优势加工椰子水、椰肉等产品，并计划利用椰壳发电、椰糠制有机肥。该案例展示了自动化技术与供应链管理在热带水果出口中的实际应用与产业带动效应。
featuredReason: 该案例展示了自动化去壳设备、冷链改进和分级系统在热带水果出口中的实际应用，为智慧畜牧行业在种植业自动化与供应链优化方面提供了跨领域参考。
contentFull: Chinese entrepreneur helps expand Thailand's coconut exports Chinese entrepreneur Qin Shaoyu has built a business around exporting Thai fragrant (Nam Hom) coconuts to China after entering Thailand's coconut sector in 2015. Qin first arrived in Thailand in 2006 as a volunteer Mandarin teacher before leaving education to pursue business opportunities. Qin said Chinese consumers' preference for naturally sweet flavours, together with growing demand for higher-quality products, supported the market opportunity for Thai fragrant coconuts. He also cited the growing conditions in Damnoen Saduak, where soil conditions, freshwater and seawater influence, sunshine, and an average annual temperature of around 28 degrees Celsius allow year-round production. The company initially supplied wholesale markets in Guangzhou, Beijing, and Shanghai before expanding through e-commerce. Qin co-founded ICOCO (Thailand) Co., Ltd. in September 2015 to supply Thai fragrant coconuts to the Chinese market. According to the company, Thailand exported only a small number of containers of fragrant coconuts to China in 2014. By 2015, exports had increased to around 1,000 containers, with Qin's business accounting for almost 40 per cent of that volume. The company also introduced automated coconut dehusking equipment from China into its processing operations. When Qin entered the sector, Thailand had eight coconut processing factories relying on manual dehusking. The redesigned processing workflow and automated equipment increased processing efficiency, reduced labour requirements, and standardised product quality. The approach was later adopted by other processors. The business also changed its export specifications after early shipments of young coconuts experienced damage during cold chain transport. It shifted to higher-maturity coconuts for long-distance shipping and introduced a grading system based on fruit weight and intended market. The company also follows Thailand's Good Agricultural Practices (GAP) system to provide product traceability. As volumes increased, the company established a processing facility in Nanning, Guangxi, in 2022 with an investment of more than US$2.2 million. The location allows fresh coconuts from Thailand to reach the processing plant by sea in around three days. The facility processes coconut water, coconut meat, and other coconut products for food and beverage manufacturers. According to Qin, Thailand's coconut production area has expanded from less than 16,000 hectares to around 64,000 hectares over the past decade, while farmgate prices have increased by around five times. The company currently exports to markets including China, Singapore, Indonesia, Australia, New Zealand, Japan, South Korea, the United States, and Spain. The company also plans to expand coconut processing in Thailand, including using coconut shells for energy generation and processing coconut husks into organic fertiliser for use in plantations. translationZh: 中国企业家帮助扩大泰国椰子出口。中国企业家秦少宇在2015年进入泰国椰子产业后，围绕向中国出口泰国香椰（Nam Hom）建立了一项业务。秦少宇于2006年首次以志愿中文教师身份抵达泰国，之后离开教育领域寻求商业机会。秦少宇表示，中国消费者对天然甜味的偏好，以及对更高质量产品日益增长的需求，为泰国香椰创造了市场机会。他还提到了丹嫩沙朵的生长条件：那里的土壤条件、淡水和海水影响、日照以及约28摄氏度的年平均温度，使得全年都能生产。该公司最初供应广州、北京和上海的批发市场，后来通过电子商务拓展业务。秦少宇于2015年9月共同创立了ICOCO（泰国）有限公司，向中国市场供应泰国香椰。据该公司称，2014年泰国仅向中国出口了少量集装箱的香椰。到2015年，出口量增加到约1000个集装箱，秦少宇的业务占其中近40%的份额。该公司还将中国制造的自动化椰子去壳设备引入其加工环节。当秦少宇进入该行业时，泰国有8家椰子加工厂依赖人工去壳。重新设计的加工流程和自动化设备提高了加工效率，减少了劳动力需求，并标准化了产品质量。这种方法后来被其他加工商采用。该业务还改变了出口规格，因为早期出口的嫩椰在冷链运输过程中受损。该公司转而采用成熟度更高的椰子进行长途运输，并根据水果重量和目标市场引入了分级系统。该公司还遵循泰国的良好农业规范（GAP）体系，以实现产品可追溯性。随着产量增加，该公司于2022年在广西南宁建立了一个加工厂，投资额超过220万美元。该地点使泰国的新鲜椰子能在约三天内通过海运抵达加工厂。该工厂加工椰子水、椰肉及其他椰子产品，供应给食品和饮料制造商。据秦少宇称，过去十年间，泰国的椰子种植面积从不到1.6万公顷扩大到约6.4万公顷，而田间收购价上涨了约五倍。该公司目前向中国、新加坡、印度尼西亚、澳大利亚、新西兰、日本、韩国、美国、西班牙等市场出口。该公司还计划在泰国扩大椰子加工业务，包括利用椰壳发电，以及将椰糠加工成有机肥料用于种植园。加纳的牛油果产业……
